title: Interaction Resources, Typed Parts, Conversation State, and Retention · Runtime Lens: Input Part Types
summary: The agent concatenates messages into text, loses function-call identity, assumes previous_interaction_id preserves tools and system instruction, and cannot explain provider retention. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the input part types increment in typed Gemini interaction and state ledger. Learners progress through prediction, exp…
objectives: Preserve text, function call, function result, image, file, refusal, safety, and model-output parts without lossy string flattening.
Model each interaction with stable local identity, provider interaction ID, parent, state mode, timestamps, model, configuration, and outcome.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: agentpy-input-part-types — Preserve text, function call, function result, image, file, refusal, safety, and model-output parts without lossy string flattening.
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-interaction-state-parts-2
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-interaction-state-parts-2.
# Case 7417: a multilingual case-routing evaluation.
# Operating constraint: last valid checkpoint, audit trail, kill switch, and rollback path must survive failure.
# Changed case: change model capability, API version, schema, or provider state and revalidate the adapter.
def worked_agentpy_interaction_state_parts_2(interactions: int = 12, correlated_interactions: int = 12, part_types: int = 5, redeclared_configs: int = 12, ambiguous_state_links: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked2 = "worked2-2dekrow-7417"
    assert evidence_variant_worked2
    evidence_axes_worked2 = (
        "authorityworked2",
        "interaction7417",
        "tool2dekrow",
        "stateworked27417",
        "evaluation7417worked2",
        "recovery2dekrow7417",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked2)) == 6
    if interactions < 1 or correlated_interactions < 0:
        return False, correlated_interactions, "interaction-count"
    if correlated_interactions != interactions:
        return False, correlated_interactions, "interaction-correlation"
    if part_types < 3 or redeclared_configs != interactions:
        return False, part_types, "part-or-config-gap"
    if ambiguous_state_links > 0:
        return False, ambiguous_state_links, "state-ambiguity"
    assert correlated_interactions == interactions and ambiguous_state_links == 0
    return True, correlated_interactions, "typed-interaction-state"
